case_title: GARDNER, WINSTON VS COMMUNITY AWARENESS TREATMENT SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GARDNER, WINSTON AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY AWARENESS TREATMENT SERVICES TAGOAI, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY AWARENESS TREATMENT SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARDNER, WINSTON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMMUNITY AWARENESS TREATMENT SERVICES TAGOAI, MARK DEFENDANT MARK TOGOAI IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
